subject: [PATCH v6 04/22] zswap: add new helpers for zswap entry operations

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch adds new helper functions to abstract away zswap entry operations, making it easier to re-implement these functions when swap is virtualized. The helpers include storing, loading, erasing, and checking if a zswap entry is empty. These functions are used in various places throughout the codebase, such as in the zswap_writeback_entry function. By introducing these abstractions, the patch aims to improve maintainability and flexibility of the zswap implementation.
